description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and an open, L-shaped layout. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The exterior is primarily finished in white and gray, with wooden accents along the perimeter fencing and patio area. The property is surrounded by a paved driveway, landscaped with several mature trees and shrubs, and includes a spacious outdoor patio and garden area. The interior layout is visible, showing open-plan living spaces, bedrooms, and utility areas. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, clean lines, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed, single-story bungalow with large windows, white and gray finishes, wooden accents, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, patio area, and several trees lining the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive driveway, dense tree coverage, and the open layout of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden patio enclosure, back garden, and more private sections of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, patio, and the arrangement of trees and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
